description: Request body to dispatch a single-file test-generation run (POST /v1/coverage/generate, coverage_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'target_file' is required — the generation is always anchored to a specific source file.

target_file.description: Repo-relative path to the source file for which tests will be generated.

write.description: When false (default), return proposed test content only. When true, write to disk.
